name: HRT_SOURCES_VL
query: SELECT S.SOURCE_ID, S.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, S.SOURCE_CODE, STL.SOURCE_DESCRIPTION, S.MODULE_ID, S.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, S.CREATED_BY, S.CREATION_DATE, S.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, S.LAST_UPDATED_BY, S.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_SOURCES_B S, HRT_SOURCES_TL STL WHERE S.SOURCE_ID = STL.SOURCE_ID AND S.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = STL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND STL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
